title: Optimizing SQL Queries with Subqueries and Indexes
scenario: Given a database schema with multiple tables, write a SQL query that joins two tables using a subquery and includes indexes on relevant columns. The query should return the top 10 results ordered by a specific column. The output should be a single SQL query string, and the judge model will check for correct syntax, index usage, and optimal query performance. The query should be under 150 words. The query should use active voice. The query should not use any deprecated SQL features.
constraints: Should use indexes on relevant columns

evaluationCriteria.description: Check for correct SQL syntax and adherence to database schema.
Check for usage of indexes on relevant columns for improved query performance.
Check for optimal query performance and minimize the number of table scans.
